basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) has released the official notification for 1 Post Doctoral Fellow post under Advt No. IP/10062/Advt0157.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Ph.D. in Economics, Agricultural Economics, Environmental Economics, Water Policy, Planning, Public Policy or a closely related discipline. The percentage/grade points with respect to the academic qualifications will be a minimum of 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onward and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th. Strong quantitative skills in micro econometric analysis; proficiency in R is essential. Demonstrated publication record in water policy, environmental economics, agricultural economics or applied economics journals. Prior experience with choice experiments. Experience and willingness to conduct fieldwork in Gujarat; knowledge of Gujarati language is an added advantage but not necessary. Prior experience to lead field survey or field experiment.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Gandhinagar Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Gandhinagar Post Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Post Doctoral Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar is 30th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Post Doctoral Fellow role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in Economics, Agricultural Economics, Environmental Economics, Water Policy, Planning, Public Policy, or a closely related discipline.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Post Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected Post Doctoral Fellow will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 72,000/- to Rs. 84,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Post Doctoral Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Post Doctoral Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is online. Candidates need to apply through the official IIT Gandhinagar website.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any specific skill required for this role?
faq.answer: Yes, strong quantitative skills in micro econometric analysis and proficiency in R are essential. Prior experience with choice experiments is also required.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Post Doctoral Fellow is a temporary job type.

faq.question: Q8. Does IIT Gandhinagar offer any age relaxation for this post?
faq.answer: Information regarding age relaxation is not explicitly provided in the summary. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for details.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is IP/10062/Advt0157.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any specific experience requirements mentioned?
faq.answer: Yes, prior experience with choice experiments is required. Additionally, experience and willingness to conduct fieldwork in Gujarat are mentioned, with knowledge of Gujarati being an added advantage.
